follow_ups.title: Add a real local service process boundary
follow_ups.reason: The validated prototype is in-process. Swift integration needs a durable local process boundary such as WebSocket, local HTTP, or stdin/stdout JSON.

follow_ups.title: Probe 500ms cumulative prefix cadence
follow_ups.reason: The 1s prefix cadence passes service gate, but a 500ms cadence may improve perceived first partial latency at higher compute cost.
